ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ring_sizes" (
  "ring_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ring size */,
  "us_canada_size" TEXT /* US/Canada ring size notation (e.g., 1 1/2, 2 1/4) */,
  "circumference_inches" REAL /* Circumference of the ring in inches */,
  "circumference_mm" REAL /* Circumference of the ring in millimeters */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU ring size (e.g., 42, 44) */,
  "uk_au_size" TEXT /* UK/Australia ring size (e.g., C, D) */,
  "jp_size" TEXT /* Japan ring size (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ring size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ring size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ring_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "ring_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring size being converted */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for which the conversion is applicable (e.g., Great Britain, Germany, France) */,
  "country_size" TEXT /* Ring size notation for the country (e.g., C, 12 3/4, 40 1/2) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor used to calculate the ring size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_conversions_ring_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("ring_size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("ring_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ring_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "ring_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring size associated with the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the ring (e.g., gold, silver, platinum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ring_products_ring_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("ring_size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("ring_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES ring_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order history entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being recorded */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, sales representative, customer) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level for the role (e.g., read-only, read-write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
